schemas.description: Per-snapshot metadata: id, date, status, pinned sources, ingestion info.
schemas.name: SVG Spec Snapshot Metadata

schemas.description: Per-snapshot element records. Top-level array — no inline $schema possible.
schemas.name: SVG Spec Elements

schemas.description: Per-snapshot attribute records. Top-level array — no inline $schema possible.
schemas.name: SVG Spec Attributes

schemas.description: Derived union element membership across all canonical snapshots.
schemas.name: SVG Union Element Membership

schemas.description: Derived union attribute membership across all canonical snapshots.
schemas.name: SVG Union Attribute Membership

schemas.description: Adjacent snapshot diff for element and attribute membership.
schemas.name: SVG Snapshot Overlay

schemas.description: Attribute value grammar definitions keyed by grammar id.
schemas.name: SVG Spec Grammars

schemas.description: Element category memberships used for content-model grouping.
schemas.name: SVG Spec Categories

schemas.description: Per-element attribute applicability matrix for the snapshot.
schemas.name: SVG Element–Attribute Matrix

schemas.description: Hand-curated exceptions and overrides applied on top of extracted data.
schemas.name: SVG Spec Exceptions

schemas.description: Extraction review notes and confidence annotations per fact.
schemas.name: SVG Spec Review

schemas.description: TOML source manifests already carry a #:schema comment; this entry covers JSON-tool consumers.
schemas.name: SVG Source Manifest
